title: tillaea aquatica var. drummondii
intro: Tillaea aquatica var. drummondii, also known as Drummond's water-tillaea or water tillaea, is a rare aquatic plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Tillaea aquatica var. drummondii include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Tillaea aquatica var. drummondii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for use in herbal remedies.
